name: Assi Nabbe Poore Sau
overview: The wilted life of a widow blossomed when a handsome gentleman gave his name to her fatherless son. But his strong arms were never meant to protect the apple of her eye. Her son went missing and the husband got nabbed in vicious court-room trials, unfolding dark secrets of rampant child murders. Watch now, as the count of innocent deaths hits 100!

trailers.title: ASSI NABBE POORE SAU | Ullu Originals  | Official Trailer | Releasing: 9th March.
